heading: View Metrics
body:
[View Project Overview](review-all-cluster-metrics)

The **Clusters** view displays all the
clusters in an Atlas project and features core
metrics per cluster. You can also view core metrics
for a specific cluster on the **Overview**
tab.

[View Atlas Flex cluster Metrics](review-flex-metrics)

View the metrics for a specific Flex cluster in an
Atlas project.

[metrics](review-replica-set-metrics)

View the metrics for a specific replica set in an Atlas
project.

[View Atlas Sharded Cluster Metrics](review-sharded-cluster-metrics)

View the metrics for a specific sharded cluster in an Atlas
project.

[MongoDB process metrics](review-mongodb-process-metrics)

View the metrics for a specific MongoDB process in an
Atlas cluster.

[View Real-Time Performance Metrics](review-real-time-metrics)

View real-time performance metrics for a specific Atlas
cluster in a project.

[MongoDB Search charts](review-atlas-search-metrics)

View MongoDB Search metrics for Atlas clusters with at least one active
MongoDB Search index.
